stemHtml: An aircraft is in receipt of ATIS broadcast "OTOPENI INFORMATION OSCAR". This broadcast can be expected to contain a lot of information about Otopeni aerodrome, including the…

options.a: Standard arrival route(s) to be expected, the runway(s) in use, aerodrome altitude.
options.b: Departure route(s) to be expected, the runway(s) in use, aerodrome altitude.
options.c: Type of approach(s) to be expected, the runway(s) in use, present weather.
options.d: Taxi-out delay, runway(s) physical characteristics, present weather.
